title: Improve handling of empty switches
body:
_What are the reasons/motivation for this change?_

Close #5572 by resolving two problems:

1. Attributes on empty switches produce invalid verilog
2. `full_case` switches with all empty cases require two calls to `proc_clean`

_Explain how this is achieved._

1. Skip empty switches in `write_verilog`
2. Set `did_something = true` when clearing a `full_case` switch

_Make sure your change comes with tests. If not possible, share how a reviewer might evaluate it._

tests/verilog/bug5572.ys and tests/proc/bug5572.ys from #5572 respectively for the two fixes.
